title: AV Technician (Singaporean)
description:
JOB DESCRIPTIONS

  • Set- up of PA / AV / VC systems and equipment. Service, troubleshoot and maintenance of the systems and equipment.
  • Prepare and schedule time for events. Participate in the set up and ensuring the smooth operations of events.
  • Ensure safety and compliance in AV storage area.
  • Coordinate with contractor to repair the system if required.
  • To carry out routine checks on AV and VC systems and equipment to ensure they are in working condition . Priority checks for Auditorium and meeting rooms or when major events are held at .
  • Attending to requests/ queries, feedback and complaints pertaining to AV and VC systems and equipment.
  • Providing technical advice , operational support for for audio visual requirements.
  • Responding to complaints , faults if any reported or detected during routine servicing and maintenance. To investigate the cause of the faults, to make recommendations for the repair required and promptly rectify them.
  • Liaising with event organizers on logistics support and event set up requirements.
  • To also assist in general maintenance of the building. Training can be provided.

JOB REQUIREMENTS

  • Candidate must possess at least a Nitec / Higher Nitec qualification or Diploma in Electrical / Communication or electronics engineering field .
  • At least 4 year(s) of working experience in the related field is needed.
  • Good communication and written skills
  • Good exposure in large scale events, Hotel or Exhibition experience.

5.5 days work week. Only Singaporean

postedCompany.description:
Kim Yew Integrated Pte Ltd (Previously known as Kim Yew Electrical & Sanitary Pte Ltd) was established in Year 1985 as a sub-contractor under-taking electrical and plumbing works. Over the years, the company has grown by building on its core strengths. The company was then incorporated in Singapore into a private limited company in year 1996. Since then it has emerged as an established integrated facilities management service provider offering various types of professional services including facilities management, maintenance of building facilities, consultancy services, etc.

 

The company had also worked with several building contractors for A&A projects at various locations throughout Singapore. Such projects include areas from the commercial, government and institutional sectors. We have strong working relationships with our partners and specialists as we believed in teamwork, cooperation and unity.

 

We support the green movement and other energy conservation initiatives. We worked in collaboration with ESCOs to improve energy conservation efforts for clients. We are ISO 9001:2008 and ISO 18001:2000 certified.
postedCompany.name: KIM YEW INTEGRATED PTE. LTD.
